objective: Implement SQLite persistence, search, feedback, and status updates.
execution_method: Create a lightweight SQLite store with optional FTS5 fallback and feedback-aware ranking.
quality_gate: Store initializes; records can be created, searched, promoted, deprecated, and feedback-adjusted.

objective: Expose memory tools through the adapter registry.
execution_method: Add a registered adapter with status, record, search, get, context, simulation, literature, web, feedback, promote, and deprecate tools.
quality_gate: Adapter initializes and all tool schemas satisfy registry tests.

objective: Cover store behavior, adapter behavior, and tool registration.
execution_method: Add focused pytest coverage for persistence, ranking, status updates, and MCP calls.
quality_gate: Focused memory tests and existing schema tests pass.

objective: Document memory/RAG workflows and safety boundaries.
execution_method: Explain daily notes, simulation error reuse, Zotero notes, web-source draft review, and that this is not model-weight training.
quality_gate: Documentation includes practical examples and safety defaults.

objective: Run focused validation and record results.
execution_method: Run focused pytest/ruff checks where available and append concise results.
quality_gate: Checks pass or blockers are documented.
